allow: PowerShell($lines = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\User\\.claude\\projects\\d--GHL-Food-Estimator---Spandis\\eff539ca-dcbd-452a-bfa8-728f4621555b.jsonl" | Select-String "Garlic Beef|Lumpiang|Korean Roast|Blueberry Roast|XXXL Combo|combo_" | Select-Object -First 5; foreach \($line in $lines\) { $txt = $line.Line; $idx = $txt.IndexOf\("Garlic Beef"\); if \($idx -lt 0\) { $idx = $txt.IndexOf\("combo_"\) }; if \($idx -lt 0\) { $idx = 0 }; $start = [Math]::Max\(0, $idx - 50\); $len = [Math]::Min\(3000, $txt.Length - $start\); Write-Host "=== MATCH at $\($line.LineNumber\) ==="; Write-Host $txt.Substring\($start, $len\) })

PowerShell($lines = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\User\\.claude\\projects\\d--GHL-Food-Estimator---Spandis\\eff539ca-dcbd-452a-bfa8-728f4621555b.jsonl" | Select-String "package_id|combo_15|fam_combo|feast_combo|package_items|dish_id" | Select-Object -First 5; foreach \($line in $lines\) { $txt = $line.Line; $idx = $txt.IndexOf\("package_id"\); if \($idx -lt 0\) { $idx = $txt.IndexOf\("dish_id"\) }; if \($idx -lt 0\) { $idx = 0 }; $start = [Math]::Max\(0, $idx - 50\); $len = [Math]::Min\(2000, $txt.Length - $start\); Write-Host "=== LINE $\($line.LineNumber\) ==="; Write-Host $txt.Substring\($start, $len\) })
